prompt: A soft, editorial-style outdoor fashion photograph of a woman standing in a wildflower meadow in the mountains during daylight, shown from behind with her body turned slightly three-quarters to the side and her head angled back toward the camera. She has shoulder-length to mid-back tousled {argument name="hair color" default="dark blonde"} hair, windblown and slightly messy. Her face is fully obscured by a flat rectangular blur block in a warm beige-brown tone. She wears a delicate, sheer white lace outfit consisting of 2 visible pieces: a long-sleeved semi-transparent floral lace top with ruffled cuffs and high-waisted white lace bottoms. The pose is relaxed and sensual, one arm hanging down and the other resting near her hip. Surround her with dense natural grasses and blooming wildflowers, including visible white daisies and small yellow flowers in the foreground and midground. Place her in front of rolling green and golden hills with dramatic chalky white cliff faces and erosion lines across the background. Use a wide open landscape, partly cloudy blue sky, warm natural sunlight, earthy tones, shallow depth of field, cinematic composition, realistic photography, high detail, soft contrast, and a dreamy bohemian countryside mood.
translatedPrompt: 一张柔和的户外时尚风格摄影作品，展现了一位女性在白天的山间野花草甸中伫立，画面呈现其背影，身体微微侧转四分之三，头部向镜头方向回眸。她留着齐肩至中背部的凌乱 {argument name="hair color" default="深金色"} 秀发，发丝随风飘动，略显蓬松。她的面部被一个暖米棕色的平整矩形模糊块完全遮挡。她身着精致的白色透明蕾丝套装，由两件可见单品组成：一件长袖半透明碎花蕾丝上衣（带有荷叶边袖口）和一件高腰白色蕾丝下装。姿态放松而感性，一只手臂自然下垂，另一只手轻搭在髋部。周围环绕着茂密的天然草丛和盛开的野花，前景和中景可见白色雏菊和黄色小花。背景是连绵起伏的绿色与金色山丘，以及带有戏剧性白垩质感悬崖面和侵蚀纹理的山体。采用广阔的景观视野、局部多云的蓝天、温暖的自然光、大地色调、浅景深、电影级构图、写实摄影风格、高细节、柔和对比度，营造出梦幻的波西米亚乡村氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 野花山丘上的时尚大片：此提示词可生成一张写实的户外时尚肖像，展现一位身着白色透明蕾丝裙的女性伫立在花海漫布的山间草甸，适用于时尚、生活方式或梦幻乡村风格的摄影创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
